hero.desc: Building thoughtful software for the web. I design and build resilient, user-first systems — from clean interfaces to APIs that power them.

about.label: / 01 — About
about.p1: I'm a software engineer who cares deeply about how things feel — both for the people who use the product and the engineers who maintain it.
about.p2: I lean toward simple architectures, well-typed boundaries, and code that reads like prose. I've worked across the stack — from frontend interfaces to backend systems.
about.p3: I enjoy the unglamorous work: observability, migrations, and turning fragile prototypes into systems teams can rely on.

toolkit.desc: I'm a generalist with a backend lean. Comfortable across the stack and happy to learn whatever the problem needs — these are simply the tools I keep coming back to.
